plugins.name: grafana-plugins
plugins.description: Skills for building Grafana plugins — bundle optimisation, code splitting, and plugin development

skills.name: plugin-bundle-size
skills.description: Optimise Grafana app plugin bundle size using React.lazy, Suspense, and webpack code splitting. Use when the user asks to reduce plugin bundle size, fix large bundles, or split plugin code.

skills.name: react-19-plugin-migration
skills.description: Migrate a Grafana plugin to React 19 compatibility. Use when the user asks to update a plugin for React 19, fix React 19 build errors, or prepare a plugin for Grafana 12.

plugins.name: grafana-core
plugins.description: Core Grafana concepts — dashboards, panels, PromQL, and visualization

plugins.name: grafana-cloud
plugins.description: Grafana Cloud — Loki, Tempo, Pyroscope, and the LGTM observability stack
